content.en:
"Come in!"

Ye Tian took a look at these Sevenfold Dao Realms behind him and found that they were a little scared.

After all, this place is extremely dangerous, and many of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms that came in before have fallen, and even a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm that has taken the path of the Supreme Extreme Dao has fallen.

They also knew it, so they were afraid that Ye Tian would not be able to protect them.

However, the status of the Su Domain Lord in the Su Nationality is very high, and they are subordinate to the Su Nationality, so naturally they dare not disobey the Su Domain Lord's orders.

"Something's coming!"

Ye Tian's words made the Sevenfold Dao Realm people present tremble, for fear of being killed.

In an instant, a strange black figure came out, unable to see the appearance clearly, but the aura of the whole body was extremely powerful, enough to rival the top Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm.

"Die!"

Ye Tian waved his hand casually, and the fifth sequence of supreme rules penetrated the opponent's body, killing it in an instant.

This scene made these sevenfold supreme Dao realms breathe a sigh of relief.

"Go ahead!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Many sevenfold to the realm of the Dao should be the Dao.

Immediately, they moved on.

Along the way, when he encountered a creature in the treasure land, he directly killed it, and the resources obtained were collected by him, and after he went out, he could leave thirty percent.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian and this group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms were looking for resources little by little, mainly looking for items that contained the rules of the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao.

But it has not been found.

However, this treasure land is also very large, and they are not in a hurry.

I have to say that the resources of this treasure land are still very rich, and there are many resources that are of great value to the Eightfold Dao Realm, but the resources that are useful to the Ninefold Dao Realm are very rare, and the number is not many.

But if he really wants to scrape all the resources of this treasure land, he can still find a lot of good things, and once he gets thirty percent, he will also be able to advance his cultivation to the late stage of the sevenfold Dao realm in a short period of time.

"This group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm has been staring at it, and there is no way to condense and copy the body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

His plan was to condense the true body copy body, and then hide in this treasure land, let the copy body find resources at the other end of the treasure land, in case he found an item containing the fourth sequence of supreme dao rules, then he could take most of it, leaving only a little bit for the Su domain lord!

But this group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm was here, and he couldn't do that, it was too easy to be discovered.

"We have to find a way to avoid this group of Sevenfold Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And on this day, the opportunity came.

Rumble!!!!!!

A creature in the mist appeared, and its aura had reached the level of invincibility of the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, between the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm and the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm.

And these sevenfold Dao realm looked at this creature, and they couldn't estimate the strength of the other party at all, and only felt that they were ants.

Through the copying talent, Ye Tian knew that this creature was called Longze Mist Beast.

Airplanes!!!!!

The Longze Mist Beast spewed out a large amount of mist, and these mist contained the power of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, which was roughly equivalent to the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules of the Perfection Realm.

All of a sudden, these Sevenfold Dao Realms were completely disillusioned and unable to sense everything around them at all.

What's even more terrifying is that these fogs are eroding their wills and their bodies.

"Ye Domain Lord, save us!"

This group of sevenfold Dao realms seeks the Tao.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian turned into a light shield with the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, protecting this group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms, blocking the fog and keeping them in a safe state.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian fought with this dragon Ze fog beast.

With his strength, it was possible to kill this dragon mist beast, and it wouldn't take too long.

However, Ye Tian didn't want to kill this Longze Mist Beast so quickly, but while fighting with the other party, he divided his mind and condensed his true body to copy his body.

"Hahahaha, this dragon Ze fog beast is really ingenious. "

Ye Tian quickly condensed and copied his body.

It didn't take too long for the copy body to condense successfully, and those Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms couldn't perceive it yet.

"Let's go!"

The replica body quickly fled, leaving from here, ready to travel to the distant reaches of this treasure land.

As long as the two replica bodies do not touch each other and leave far away, they will not attract the attention of these sevenfold supreme realms.

After another period of time, Ye Tian finally killed this Longze Mist Beast.

Suddenly, the fog lifted.

And these Sevenfold Dao Realms finally breathed a sigh of relief.

At this time, they couldn't help but admire Ye Tian's strength, even such a terrifying creature could be killed.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian's other copy body had already left this group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms far away, and he didn't collect other resources, he would only collect them unless he encountered very rare resources, and most of his time was spent looking for Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

Whether it is a dangerous place or a deep underground, it is within the scope of his search.

Other than that.

He also doesn't fight other creatures, at most forcing them back, so as not to cause too strong combat fluctuations.

And just like that, the days passed slowly.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian found an item.

It was a drop of black water, containing wisps of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, it was too deeply hidden, hidden in the depths of a vein, if it wasn't for accidentally digging up this group of veins, he really couldn't find it.

"Refine this drop of black water and try the effect. "

Ye Tian swallowed it in one gulp, and this drop of black water melted into all parts of his body.

"No damage to the body, no damage to the origin?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But in the next moment, his will was affected, as if he was hallucinating, and his mood was affected.

He disconnected the replica from the other duplicates, which saved the other replicating bodies from being affected.

"It affects the will and state of mind, but it is true that you can comprehend the rules of the fourth sequence of the Supreme Dao!

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he estimated that just one drop of this black water was not enough to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and more black water was needed.

He continued to contemplate and comprehend, and after a while, this drop of black water was consumed, but he vaguely comprehended the rules of the fourth sequence of supreme paths.

Moreover, he intends to calculate the sequelae.

The foundation of the will is damaged, but the biggest thought is still the state of mind.

He is now in an unstable mood, hallucinating from time to time, and his physical body cannot be controlled, as if he is sick.

How could the Sevenfold Dao Realm be sick, it can only be said that there is a big problem with his state of mind.

"Duplicate the other bodies first, change the body!"

Subsequently.

He changed his body, and only then did he remove the influence.

After that, he worked hard to find this black water.

Another day, he found a drop of black water again, and this time he didn't continue refining, but put it away, and when he found more black water, he would refine it again.
